title: BUG #19350: Short circuit optimization missed when running sql scriptes in JDBC
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id INT PRIMARY KEY GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY, value INT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2(a INT, b INT);
INSERT INTO t2(a, b) VALUES (10, 2), (20, NULL), (30, 5);
SELECT (SELECT value FROM t1 WHERE value > 2) / (SELECT COALESCE(b, 1) FROM t2 WHERE a = 20);
key_bug_features: Divide by zero error in JDBC prepared statement execution
